quality.rationale: 基于四维动量标量积的洛伦兹不变性跨参考系关联运动学量，需多步代数推导，属标准高能物理散射运动学模型

origin.question: Problem 2.11. Consider the reaction $1 + 2\rightarrow 3 + 4$ . The lab frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\mathbf{P}}_2 = 0$ . The C.M. frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\mathbf{P}}_1^{\mathbf{C.M.}} + \underline{\mathbf{P}}_2^{\mathbf{C.M.}} = 0$ . Show that:\n(b) $\mathbf{E}_1^{\mathbf{C.M.}} = \left[\left(\mathbf{E}_{\mathrm{total}}^{\mathbf{C.M.}}\right)^2 +\mathbf{m}_1^2 -\mathbf{m}_2^2\right] / 2\mathbf{E}_{\mathrm{total}}^{\mathbf{C.M.}}$
origin.answer: $\mathbf {E}_{1}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.} = [ (\mathbf {E}_{\mathrm {t o t a l}}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.})^{2} + \mathbf {m}_{1}^{2} - \mathbf {m}_{2}^{2} ] / 2 \mathbf {E}_{\mathrm {t o t a l}}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.}.$
origin.solution:
(b) In the equation
$$
\mathbf {P}_{1} \cdot \mathbf {P}_{	ext {t o t a l}} = \mathbf {P}_{1} \cdot \left(\mathbf {P}_{1} + \mathbf {P}_{2}ight)
$$
evaluate the left side in the C.M. frame and the right side in the lab frame:
$$
 egin{array}{l}
 - \mathrm {E}_{1}^{\mathrm {C . M .}} \mathrm {E}_{	ext {t o t a l}}^{\mathrm {C . M .}} = - \mathrm {m}_{1}^{2} - \mathrm {E}_{1} \mathrm {m}_{2} \\n= - \mathrm {m}_{1}^{2} -  rac {1}{2} \left[ \left(\mathrm {E}_{	ext {t o t a l}}^{\mathrm {C . M .}}ight)^{2} - \mathrm {m}_{1}^{2} - \mathrm {m}_{2}^{2}ight] \quad (	ext {f r o m (a)}) \\n\end{array}
$$
Hence, the result:
$$
\mathbf {E}_{1}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.} = [ (\mathbf {E}_{\mathrm {t o t a l}}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.})^{2} + \mathbf {m}_{1}^{2} - \mathbf {m}_{2}^{2} ] / 2 \mathbf {E}_{\mathrm {t o t a l}}^{\mathbf{C}. \mathbf{M}.}.
$$
